description: Authorized AI Agent router requests predictions from the secure network.
External client attempts to call Predict service from public IP (no access level).

evaluation_detail.reason: Ingress denied: No matching ingress rule allows identity 'user:external_developer@gmail.com' accessing 'aiplatform.googleapis.com/google.cloud.aiplatform.v1.PredictionService.Predict' from source access levels.

description: Authorized data router exports verified BQ telemetry downstream to shared analytics.
Compromised internal identity attempts to copy storage blobs to a malicious public bucket.

evaluation_detail.reason: Egress denied: Exfiltration blocked. Accessing external resource 'projects/malicious_public_bucket' via service 'storage.googleapis.com/google.cloud.storage.v1.Objects.Insert' is not permitted by egress policies.

description: Insider threat uses a Cloud Build job running inside the perimeter to write to an unauthorized external storage bucket.

evaluation_detail.reason: Egress denied: Exfiltration blocked. Accessing external resource 'projects/malicious_public_bucket' via service 'storage.googleapis.com/google.cloud.storage.v1.Objects.Insert' is not permitted by egress policies.

description: Insider threat attempts to trigger Cloud Build to run build steps that egress to an external IP/project.

evaluation_detail.reason: Egress denied: Exfiltration blocked. Accessing external resource 'projects/external_malicious_infrastructure' via service 'cloudbuild.googleapis.com/google.devtools.cloudbuild.v1.CreateBuild' is not permitted by egress policies.

description: Authorized external vendor accesses BigQuery dataset from trusted network location.
External vendor SA attempts to access BigQuery dataset from untrusted public IP (no trusted access level).

evaluation_detail.reason: Ingress denied: No matching ingress rule allows identity 'serviceAccount:vendor-analyst-sa@external-consulting-firm.iam.gserviceaccount.com' accessing 'bigquery.googleapis.com/google.cloud.bigquery.v2.TableService.GetData' from source access levels.

description: External vendor SA attempts to access Vertex AI prediction APIs (unauthorized service).

evaluation_detail.reason: Ingress denied: No matching ingress rule allows identity 'serviceAccount:vendor-analyst-sa@external-consulting-firm.iam.gserviceaccount.com' accessing 'aiplatform.googleapis.com/google.cloud.aiplatform.v1.PredictionService.Predict' from source access levels.
